race.description: Amelia Park-National Apprentice Series Ht6 Handicap
race.comment: Another apprentice's race here and again, siding with the local combo. RALLY THE TROOPS (5) has been finishing off strongly in recent efforts, finishing 1.3L off the winner last start. That form has been franked already and the draw suits his racing pattern. Can get back to winning ways. SUCCESS PLAY (11) led them up at the mile at Ascot last time out and was only caught late in the race. That was in Saturday company, so he'll find this a bit easier today and the draw should give him every chance. Should be at his peak now and he can end his winning drought. MORE THAN ENUFF (8) has trialled nicely coming into this campaign after a disappointing end to his last preparation. He's got a strong fresh record and is a course and distance winner previously. This looks well within his grasp. HOUSEWIFE (12) will be fitter for the fresh effort and can improve now. MANHATTAN STRIP (10) won't be far away if he runs up to his latest effort.
